steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which equation correctly represents the total part count. Let n = number of 9-inch parts. Then 8-inch parts = 4n, and 3-inch parts = 30. The total must equal 100 parts: $$4n + n + 30 = 100$$

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: trap — multiplies by lengths instead of counting parts. ✗
  • Choice B: trap — wrong multiplier on n. ✗
  • Choice C: trap — omits the 30 fixed parts. ✗
  • Choice D — '4n + n + 30 = 100': correctly counts all three part types. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
